Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation At Trial
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

RE: Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s motion for bifurcation at trial.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Lyft, Inc.'s motion for bifurcation at trial is denied without prejudice. The motion should be brought before the trial judge.

Counsel for the prevailing party submitted proposed order via email.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/CK)
